---
title: "r_code"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#install.packages(c("sf", "tidyverse", "janitor", "plotly", "shiny", "readxl"))
# install.packages("DT")

library(sf)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(janitor)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)

```

# Data cleaning

```{r}
demo_raw <- read_excel(
  "data/sf1_dp_cd_demoprofile.xlsx",
  sheet = "CD Profiles",
  col_names = FALSE
)
```
```{r}
dim(demo_raw)
demo_raw[1:20, 1:8]
```

```{r}
demo_chr <- demo_raw %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
```

```{r}
tmp_labels <- pmap_chr(
  demo_chr[, 1:5],
  function(...) {
    vals <- c(...)
    vals <- vals[!is.na(vals) & vals != ""]
    str_squish(paste(vals, collapse = " "))
  }
)

demo_chr <- demo_chr %>%
  mutate(row_label = tmp_labels)
```

```{r}
demo_chr[1:20, c(1:6, ncol(demo_chr))]
```

```{r}
district_start_rows <- which(
  str_detect(
    demo_chr$row_label,
    "^(Bronx|Brooklyn|Manhattan|Queens|Staten Island) Community District [0-9]+$"
  )
)

length(district_start_rows)
district_start_rows[1:10]
demo_chr$row_label[district_start_rows[1:10]]
```

```{r}
extract_district_profile <- function(start_row, data, district_rows) {
  
  next_rows <- district_rows[district_rows > start_row]
  
  if (length(next_rows) > 0) {
    end_row <- min(next_rows) - 1
  } else {
    end_row <- nrow(data)
  }
  
  block <- data[start_row:end_row, ]
  
  district_name <- block$row_label[1] %>% str_trim()
  
  borough <- str_extract(district_name, "^(Bronx|Brooklyn|Manhattan|Queens|Staten Island)")
  district_n <- as.integer(str_extract(district_name, "[0-9]+$"))
  
  borough_prefix <- case_when(
    borough == "Manhattan" ~ 100,
    borough == "Bronx" ~ 200,
    borough == "Brooklyn" ~ 300,
    borough == "Queens" ~ 400,
    borough == "Staten Island" ~ 500
  )
  
  boro_cd <- borough_prefix + district_n
  
  get_2010_value <- function(label_pattern) {
    row_id <- which(str_detect(block$row_label, regex(label_pattern, ignore_case = TRUE)))
    
    if (length(row_id) == 0) return(NA_real_)
    
    row_vals <- unlist(block[row_id[1], ])
    nums <- suppressWarnings(parse_number(row_vals))
    nums <- nums[!is.na(nums)]
    
    if (length(nums) == 0) return(NA_real_)
    
    if (length(nums) >= 3) {
      return(nums[3])
    } else {
      return(NA_real_)
    }
  }
  
  tibble(
    boro_cd = boro_cd,
    borough = borough,
    district_n = district_n,
    district_name = district_name,
    population_2010 = get_2010_value("^Total Population$"),
    white_nonhisp_2010 = get_2010_value("White\\s+Nonhispanic"),
    black_nonhisp_2010 = get_2010_value("Black\\s+Nonhispanic"),
    asian_pi_nonhisp_2010 = get_2010_value("Asian and Pacific Islander\\s+Nonhispanic"),
    other_nonhisp_2010 = get_2010_value("Other\\s+Nonhispanic"),
    two_plus_nonhisp_2010 = get_2010_value("Two or More Races\\s+Nonhispanic"),
    hispanic_2010 = get_2010_value("Hispanic Origin")
  )
}
```

```{r}
demographics_clean <- map_dfr(
  district_start_rows,
  extract_district_profile,
  data = demo_chr,
  district_rows = district_start_rows
)
```

```{r}
nrow(demographics_clean)
glimpse(demographics_clean)
```
```{r}
demographics_clean <- demographics_clean %>%
  mutate(
    pct_white_nonhisp_2010 = white_nonhisp_2010 / population_2010,
    pct_black_nonhisp_2010 = black_nonhisp_2010 / population_2010,
    pct_asian_pi_nonhisp_2010 = asian_pi_nonhisp_2010 / population_2010,
    pct_hispanic_2010 = hispanic_2010 / population_2010,
    pct_nonwhite_2010 = 1 - pct_white_nonhisp_2010
  )
```

```{r}
demographics_clean %>%
  select(
    boro_cd,
    borough,
    district_n,
    district_name,
    population_2010,
    white_nonhisp_2010,
    black_nonhisp_2010,
    asian_pi_nonhisp_2010,
    hispanic_2010,
    pct_nonwhite_2010
  ) %>%
  arrange(boro_cd) %>%
  head(15)
```

```{r}
nrow(demographics_clean)
sum(is.na(demographics_clean$population_2010))
sum(is.na(demographics_clean$white_nonhisp_2010))
sum(is.na(demographics_clean$pct_nonwhite_2010))
range(demographics_clean$population_2010, na.rm = TRUE)
range(demographics_clean$pct_nonwhite_2010, na.rm = TRUE)
```
```{r}
dir.create("clean_data", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

write_csv(
  demographics_clean,
  "clean_data/demographics_cd_clean.csv"
)
```

```{r}
sum(is.na(demographics_clean$pct_nonwhite_2010))
range(demographics_clean$pct_nonwhite_2010, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
park_cd <- st_read("data/Parks_Properties_20260314.geojson") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  mutate(
    across(where(is.character), ~ str_trim(.)),
    across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(., "")),
    across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(., "NA")),
    across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(., "N/A")),
    across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(., "null")),
    across(where(is.character), ~ replace_na(., "Unknown")),
    boro_cd = as.character(communityboard)
  )

# ── 2. Inspect ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
glimpse(park_cd)
park_cd %>% summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.))))

# ── 3. Export ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
write_csv(park_cd, "clean_data/park_with_cd.csv")
```



```{r}
hvi_raw <- read_csv("data/Heat_Vulnerability_Index_Rankings_20260314.csv") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  rename(
    zcta = zip_code_tabulation_area_zcta_2020,
    hvi  = heat_vulnerability_index_hvi
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    zcta = as.character(zcta),
    hvi  = as.numeric(hvi)
  )

cd_boundaries <- st_read("data/databoundaries/geo_export_3436ec5d-9845-403d-82b8-c46c8a58d650.shp") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(boro_cd = as.character(boro_cd))

zcta_boundaries <- st_read("data/zcta/geo_export_6cac0758-54de-4d67-8d21-48cdf69cbc52.shp") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(zcta = as.character(zcta))

# ── 2. Merge HVI onto ZCTA boundaries, then map to community districts ──
hvi_cd <- zcta_boundaries %>%
  left_join(hvi_raw, by = "zcta") %>%
  st_transform(st_crs(cd_boundaries)) %>%
  st_join(
    cd_boundaries %>% select(boro_cd),
    join = st_intersects,
    left = FALSE
  ) %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(boro_cd) %>%
  summarise(
    hvi = mean(hvi, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── 3. Save cleaned file ─────────────────────────────────────────────
write_csv(hvi_cd, "clean_data/hvi_cd_clean.csv")
```

```{r}
names(hvi_raw)
```


```{r}
poverty_raw <- read_csv("data/Neighborhood_poverty.csv")
crosswalk   <- read_csv("data/2020_Census_Tracts_to_2020_NTAs_and_CDTAs_Equivalency_20260314.csv")

# ── 2. Clean, join and summarise in one pipeline ─────────────────────
poverty_cd_summary <- poverty_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(time_period, geo_type, geo_id, geography, number, percent) %>%
  rename(
    district_name = geography,
    poverty_rate  = percent,
    poverty_count = number
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    poverty_count = parse_number(as.character(poverty_count)),
    poverty_rate  = as.numeric(poverty_rate)
  ) %>%
  filter(geo_type == "NTA2020") %>%
  left_join(
    crosswalk %>%
      clean_names() %>%
      select(nta_code, nta_name, cdta_code, cdta_name, boro_name) %>%
      distinct(nta_code, .keep_all = TRUE),
    by = c("district_name" = "nta_name")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    boro_cd = case_when(
      str_starts(cdta_code, "MN") ~ paste0("1", str_sub(cdta_code, 3, 4)),
      str_starts(cdta_code, "BX") ~ paste0("2", str_sub(cdta_code, 3, 4)),
      str_starts(cdta_code, "BK") ~ paste0("3", str_sub(cdta_code, 3, 4)),
      str_starts(cdta_code, "QN") ~ paste0("4", str_sub(cdta_code, 3, 4)),
      str_starts(cdta_code, "SI") ~ paste0("5", str_sub(cdta_code, 3, 4)),
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(boro_cd, cdta_name, boro_name, time_period) %>%
  summarise(
    poverty_count = sum(poverty_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    poverty_rate  = mean(poverty_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── 3. Inspect ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
glimpse(poverty_cd_summary)

# ── 4. Export (one file only) ────────────────────────────────────────
write_csv(poverty_cd_summary, "clean_data/poverty_cleaned.csv")
```



```{r}
read_csv("clean_data/hvi_cd_clean.csv") %>% colnames()
read_csv("clean_data/demographics_cd_clean.csv") %>% colnames()
read_csv("clean_data/park_with_cd.csv") %>% colnames()
read_csv("clean_data/poverty_cleaned.csv") %>% colnames()
```
```{r}
cd_boundaries %>%
  mutate(
    borough = case_when(
      str_starts(boro_cd, "1") ~ "Manhattan",
      str_starts(boro_cd, "2") ~ "Bronx",
      str_starts(boro_cd, "3") ~ "Brooklyn",
      str_starts(boro_cd, "4") ~ "Queens",
      str_starts(boro_cd, "5") ~ "Staten Island"
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = borough), color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_sf_text(aes(label = boro_cd), size = 2) +
  labs(title = "NYC Community District Map (boro_cd)") +
  theme_minimal()

# check boundary columns
names(cd_boundaries)

# =========================================================
# 2. READ CLEANED DATASETS
# =========================================================
hvi_cd <- read_csv("clean_data/hvi_cd_clean.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(boro_cd = as.character(boro_cd))

demographics_cd <- read_csv("clean_data/demographics_cd_clean.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(boro_cd = as.character(boro_cd))

park_cd <- read_csv("clean_data/park_with_cd.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(boro_cd = as.character(boro_cd))

poverty_cd <- read_csv("clean_data/poverty_cleaned.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(boro_cd = as.character(boro_cd))

# =========================================================
# 3. PREPARE UNIQUE boro_cd LIST FOR EACH DATASET
# =========================================================
hvi_keys <- hvi_cd %>%
  distinct(boro_cd) %>%
  mutate(in_hvi = "Matched")

demographics_keys <- demographics_cd %>%
  distinct(boro_cd) %>%
  mutate(in_demo = "Matched")

park_keys <- park_cd %>%
  distinct(boro_cd) %>%
  mutate(in_park = "Matched")

poverty_keys <- poverty_cd %>%
  distinct(boro_cd) %>%
  mutate(in_poverty = "Matched")

# =========================================================
# 4. JOIN TO CD BOUNDARIES FOR QA MAPS
# =========================================================
map_hvi <- cd_boundaries %>%
  left_join(hvi_keys, by = "boro_cd") %>%
  mutate(in_hvi = replace_na(in_hvi, "Missing"))

map_demo <- cd_boundaries %>%
  left_join(demographics_keys, by = "boro_cd") %>%
  mutate(in_demo = replace_na(in_demo, "Missing"))

map_park <- cd_boundaries %>%
  left_join(park_keys, by = "boro_cd") %>%
  mutate(in_park = replace_na(in_park, "Missing"))

map_poverty <- cd_boundaries %>%
  left_join(poverty_keys, by = "boro_cd") %>%
  mutate(in_poverty = replace_na(in_poverty, "Missing"))

# =========================================================
# 5. PRINT QA TABLES
# =========================================================
cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("QA CHECK: DATASET boro_cd COVERAGE\n")
cat("==============================\n")

cat("\nCD boundaries unique boro_cd:\n")
print(cd_boundaries %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% summarise(n_cd = n_distinct(boro_cd)))

cat("\nHVI unique boro_cd:\n")
print(hvi_cd %>% summarise(n_cd = n_distinct(boro_cd)))

cat("\nDemographics unique boro_cd:\n")
print(demographics_cd %>% summarise(n_cd = n_distinct(boro_cd)))

cat("\nPark unique boro_cd:\n")
print(park_cd %>% summarise(n_cd = n_distinct(boro_cd)))

cat("\nPoverty unique boro_cd:\n")
print(poverty_cd %>% summarise(n_cd = n_distinct(boro_cd)))

cat("\nboro_cd in HVI but not in boundaries:\n")
print(anti_join(hvi_keys, cd_boundaries %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% distinct(boro_cd), by = "boro_cd"))

cat("\nboro_cd in Demographics but not in boundaries:\n")
print(anti_join(demographics_keys, cd_boundaries %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% distinct(boro_cd), by = "boro_cd"))

cat("\nboro_cd in Park but not in boundaries:\n")
print(anti_join(park_keys, cd_boundaries %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% distinct(boro_cd), by = "boro_cd"))

cat("\nboro_cd in Poverty but not in boundaries:\n")
print(anti_join(poverty_keys, cd_boundaries %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% distinct(boro_cd), by = "boro_cd"))

# =========================================================
# 6. CREATE QA MAPS
# =========================================================
p_hvi <- ggplot(map_hvi) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = in_hvi), color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = "QA Map: HVI boro_cd Coverage",
    fill = "HVI"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_demo <- ggplot(map_demo) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = in_demo), color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = "QA Map: Demographics boro_cd Coverage",
    fill = "Demographics"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_park <- ggplot(map_park) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = in_park), color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = "QA Map: Park boro_cd Coverage",
    fill = "Park"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

p_poverty <- ggplot(map_poverty) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = in_poverty), color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  labs(
    title = "QA Map: Poverty boro_cd Coverage",
    fill = "Poverty"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_hvi)
print(p_demo)
print(p_park)
print(p_poverty)
```

```{r}
# master table creation
# ============================================================
# MASTER TABLE CREATION — FIXED VERSION
# ============================================================

# ── BUG FIX 1: Correct file paths (all files are in clean_data/) ──
hvi_cd <- read_csv("clean_data/hvi_cd_clean.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(boro_cd = as.character(boro_cd))

demographics_cd <- read_csv("clean_data/demographics_cd_clean.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(boro_cd = as.character(boro_cd))

park_cd <- read_csv("clean_data/park_with_cd.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(boro_cd = as.character(boro_cd))

poverty_cd <- read_csv("clean_data/poverty_cleaned.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(boro_cd = as.character(boro_cd))

# ── BUG FIX 2: cd_boundaries must already exist from earlier chunk ──
# If running this chunk in isolation, reload it:
# cd_boundaries <- st_read("data/databoundaries/geo_export_....shp") %>%
#   clean_names() %>% mutate(boro_cd = as.character(boro_cd))

# ── Park summary ──────────────────────────────────────────────
park_summary <- park_cd %>%
  mutate(acres = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(acres))) %>%
  group_by(boro_cd) %>%
  summarise(park_acres = sum(acres, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# ── Poverty (latest period only) ─────────────────────────────
poverty_latest <- poverty_cd %>%
  group_by(boro_cd) %>%
  filter(time_period == max(time_period)) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(boro_cd, poverty_rate)

# ── Demographics columns ──────────────────────────────────────
demo_select <- demographics_cd %>%
  select(
    boro_cd,
    district_name,
    population_2010,
    pct_white_nonhisp_2010,
    pct_black_nonhisp_2010,
    pct_asian_pi_nonhisp_2010,
    pct_hispanic_2010,
    pct_nonwhite_2010
  )

# ── Geometry ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
cd_geo <- cd_boundaries %>%
  select(boro_cd, geometry) %>%
  mutate(geometry_wkt = st_as_text(geometry)) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

# ── Join all datasets ─────────────────────────────────────────
master <- demo_select %>%
  left_join(park_summary,                    by = "boro_cd") %>%
  left_join(poverty_latest,                  by = "boro_cd") %>%
  left_join(hvi_cd %>% select(boro_cd, hvi), by = "boro_cd") %>%
  left_join(cd_geo,                          by = "boro_cd")

# ── BUG FIX 3: population column is already numeric (population_2010),
#    do NOT try to parse "population" which doesn't exist yet ──────────
master <- master %>%
  mutate(
    park_acres            = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(park_acres)),
    park_acres_per_capita = park_acres / population_2010   # use population_2010 directly
  )

# (the original code computed it twice — removed the redundant block)

# ── Normalisation & weighted score ───────────────────────────
minmax <- function(x) {
  (x - min(x, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(x, na.rm = TRUE) - min(x, na.rm = TRUE))
}

master <- master %>%
  mutate(
    park_norm     = 1 - minmax(park_acres_per_capita),  # inverted: less park = higher priority
    poverty_norm  = minmax(poverty_rate),
    hvi_norm      = minmax(hvi),
    overall_score = (park_norm    * 0.4375) +
                    (poverty_norm * 0.2500) +
                    (hvi_norm     * 0.3125)
  )

# ── Priority tiers ────────────────────────────────────────────
score_breaks <- quantile(master$overall_score, probs = c(0, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 1.0), na.rm = TRUE)

master <- master %>%
  mutate(
    priority_tier = case_when(
      overall_score <= score_breaks[2] ~ "Lower priority",
      overall_score <= score_breaks[3] ~ "Moderate priority",
      overall_score <= score_breaks[4] ~ "High priority",
      TRUE                             ~ "Very high priority"
    )
  )

cat("Score quartile cutoffs:\n")
print(round(score_breaks, 4))
cat("\nPriority tier counts:\n")
print(table(master$priority_tier))

# ── BUG FIX 5: population_2010 renamed to population in select(),
#    so the column exists correctly in master_final ─────────────
master_final <- master %>%
  filter(as.integer(boro_cd) %in% c(101:112, 201:212, 301:318, 401:414, 501:503)) %>%
  select(
    boro_cd,
    district_name,
    geometry_wkt,
    park_acres,
    population            = population_2010,      # renamed here
    park_acres_per_capita,
    poverty_rate,
    pct_white_nonhisp     = pct_white_nonhisp_2010,
    pct_black_nonhisp     = pct_black_nonhisp_2010,
    pct_asian_pi_nonhisp  = pct_asian_pi_nonhisp_2010,
    pct_hispanic          = pct_hispanic_2010,
    pct_nonwhite          = pct_nonwhite_2010,
    hvi,
    park_norm,
    poverty_norm,
    hvi_norm,
    overall_score,
    priority_tier
  ) %>%
  arrange(boro_cd)

dir.create("clean_data", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
write_csv(master_final, "clean_data/master_cd.csv")

cat("\n✓ master_cd.csv written —", nrow(master_final), "rows,", ncol(master_final), "columns\n")
```
